understanding.goal_understanding: The goal of the game is to place every selectable piece onto a goal tile (marked '+' in the semantic grid) simultaneously to win each level, progressing through all levels to complete the game.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Movement actions (MOVE_LEFT, MOVE_RIGHT, MOVE_UP, MOVE_DOWN) shift the currently selected piece by 3 pixels per cell in the chosen direction. Walls and some boundaries block movement. Pushable objects (blocks) can be pushed if adjacent in the movement direction. CLICK action with a target_position in pixel coordinates switches control to another selectable piece at that position. Each action consumes a step from a finite budget, and the level fails if steps run out before all goals are occupied.

understanding.goal_understanding: The goal of the game is to place every selectable piece onto a goal tile (marked '+' in the semantic grid) simultaneously to win each level, progressing through all levels to complete the game.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Movement actions (MOVE_LEFT, MOVE_RIGHT, MOVE_UP, MOVE_DOWN) shift the currently selected piece by 3 pixels per cell in the chosen direction. Walls and some boundaries block movement. Pushable objects (blocks) can be pushed if adjacent in the movement direction. CLICK action with a target_position in pixel coordinates switches control to another selectable piece at that position. Each action consumes a step from a finite budget, and the level fails if steps run out before all goals are occupied.
